title: SEALED_WHISPER user_exists check before subscription check
description: SEALED_WHISPER handler checks user_exists before subscription; an unsubscribed sender can enumerate whether any 64-char hex string is a registered user by observing the error code (not-found vs subscription-required). nie-jmmd.6 covers WHISPER; this is the same bug in SEALED_WHISPER. Fix: move subscription check before user_exists, same as WHISPER fix.
